name: London Stansted Airport (STN)
content:
IMPORTANT: if you are taking the train to Stansted, you CANNOT use the tap on/tap off system! You must buy a regular rail ticket (even though you can board the train with tap on, you cannot disembark using tap off). The authorities make use of the fact that most tourists do not know this and have no option but to pay the rail fine when arriving at Stansted by train.
Stansted is a huge fan of the duty free store. So much so, that you must speedwalk for around fifteen minutes through various duty free stores while thinking that you are late for your flight, only to find that your gate number hasn't even been posted yet.
One of the restaurants here serves soup with wooden “spoons” that are little more than a wooden spatula with abandoned aspirations of becoming a spoon. The aspirations are visible in the form of a barely perceptible depression located where the bowl of the spoon should be. Do not let the soup spatula's sweet songs of spoonful hope fool you; one must recognize the soup spatula for the monster it truly is.
